perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman stands in a Costco warehouse, holding a massive, vacuum-sealed slab of raw beef. She shows it to the camera with an excited expression. (2) The camera cuts to close-up shots of meat packages in a refrigerated display case, highlighting labels and prices. (3) The scene transitions to a brightly lit kitchen. Hands wearing black nitrile gloves use a professional chef's knife to trim silver skin and slice the large slab of beef on a wooden cutting board. Different cuts and the marbling of the meat are showcased as they are placed into bowls.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music plays throughout. A female voice speaks excitedly in Chinese about the bargain price of the meat. Sounds of a busy supermarket environment are faintly audible. (2) The music continues as a dialogue between a man and a woman begins. They discuss the origin and quality of the beef. (3) The rhythmic sound of a sharp knife slicing through meat becomes prominent. The conversation shifts to discussing the performance of the knife being used.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Costco Wholesale logo appears at the top. Subtitles translate the dialogue: '這一個一大塊' (This one is a big piece), '多少錢?' (How much?), '1300元'. (2) Decorative Text: '超值得' (Super worth it), '澳洲嫩肩里肌 399元' (Australian Oyster Blade 399 NTD), '不用特價就很便宜哦' (It's cheap even without a sale). (3) Content/Tone Text: '這一包是美國牛' (This pack is US beef), 'yes it's America貨' (Yes it's an American product), '筋...算蠻少的' (The tendons... are quite few), '新刀刀' (New knife), '小旬切牛刀' (Shun petty knife).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at supermarket -> Price/Product details -> In-depth meat cutting and quality review at home.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 person (male voice) cutting meat with hands visible, 1-2 passers-by in the supermarket background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a white blouse with ruffled sleeves and a black vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half is set in a Costco warehouse with industrial shelving and meat freezers. The second half is in a modern, clean kitchen with a wooden counter and stainless steel bowls.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document a cost-effective shopping find at Costco and provide a detailed review of the meat's quality through home preparation, while also featuring a specific brand of kitchen knife.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video prominently features Costco branding and specifically names and showcases the 'Shun' (旬) brand knife during the preparation phase.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density colorful traditional Chinese captions and a focus on 'CP value' (cost-performance ratio).
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a common 'haul and review' format popular in lifestyle vlogging, blending consumer advice with practical culinary demonstration.
